title: Actor Gets Special Award from University
summary: A famous actor named Ncuti Gatwa, who stars in the TV show Doctor Who, will get a special award called an honorary doctorate from the University of Glasgow. This award is given to people who do great things in their jobs and help society. The ceremony will happen in June, which is a special time because the university is celebrating its 575th birthday. Other people getting this award include a singer named Stuart Murdoch from a band called Belle and Sebastian, a BBC journalist named Sarah Smith, and her sister Baroness Catherine Smith. They will all be called 'Doctor' as a title to honor their work. The university leader says this award lets them recognize people who inspire others with their achievements. It's a happy event where they celebrate these special guests along with students who are graduating.

a school in Scotland that is very old and gives out awards
a special event where people get awards or celebrate something

a student who finishes school and gets a degree

options: To honor people who help society
questions.correct_answer: To honor people who help society

questions.question: Who else is getting an award besides Ncuti Gatwa?
What special birthday is the university celebrating?

background_read: The University of Glasgow is a very old university in Scotland, started in 1451. An honorary doctorate is not a real degree for studying; it's a special title given to famous or important people to say thank you for their good work. People like actors, singers, and journalists can get it if they have done things that help others or inspire people. This award is given at ceremonies where students also graduate, making it a big celebration of achievements.
Article_Structure: WHO: Ncuti Gatwa, Stuart Murdoch, Sarah Smith, Baroness Catherine Smith, and others
WHAT: They are receiving honorary doctorates as awards
WHERE: At the University of Glasgow in Scotland
WHY: To recognize their positive impact on society and professions

perspectives.description: This award shows how universities honor famous people for their influence and inspiration.
